components.title: Airlock Digital
components.description: Airlock digital provides applicatoin allow listing and execution control of software.

implemented-requirements.description: Airlock Digital agent is installed on all Windows workstations via group policy. All workstations are configured in enforcement mode providing application control.
Airlock Digital agent is installed on all non-internface facing servers. All servers are configured in enforcement mode providing applicaiton control.
Airlock Digital implements application control using cryptographic hash rules, publisher certificate rules and path rules.
Airlock digital  implemented application control using publisher certificate rules. Publisher names and product names are used.
